result.summary: Found 2 visual issues on the page: one major missing element and one minor layout overlap issue.

issues.description: The button in the top-right corner of the navigation bar appears as a blank yellow/orange rectangle with no visible text or label. It likely should contain a 'Login' or 'Register' call-to-action but the text is not rendering.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the button text is correctly applied with sufficient color contrast against the yellow background, or check if a font or color rendering issue is causing the text to be invisible.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' sticky bar at the bottom of the page overlaps and partially obscures the legal fine print disclaimer text, making important terms and conditions difficult or impossible to read.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the fine print above the scroll indicator bar, or ensure the sticky element does not cover critical legal content. Consider adding padding-bottom to the fine print section equal to the height of the sticky bar.
